title: LEGO Creator 3in1 Wild Animals: Majestic Rhino with Birds Toy - Animal Figure Transforms into a Hippo Model or a Walrus - Creative Gift for 9+ Year Old Girls & Boys - 31171
features: 3 building options in 1 box – The LEGO Creator 3in1 Wild Animals: Majestic Rhino with Birds set is a fun building toy for 9+ year old girls and boys to build and rebuild 3 animal toys with the same bricks
Endless play – Kids can role-play stories with 3 different animal figures (models cannot be built simultaneously): a rhino toy with 4 LEGO birds and a snail, a hippo toy or a walrus with a fish

Posable toy animals – The Rhino figure can move its legs, neck, ears, mouth and tail; the hippo toy can move its legs, tail, neck, ears and mouth; the walrus toy can move its fins, neck, head and body
Animal playset for play and display – When playtime is over, the brick-built animal figures double as fun display pieces for a child’s bedroom shelf or bedside table

Gift for kids and animal lovers – This LEGO 3in1 set offers a fun build-and-play experience and makes a cool gift for 9+ year old girls and boys, fans of creative toys, animal playsets and LEGO bricks
A fun way to build – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive creative adventure as they save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D while they build
3in1 LEGO building toys – 3in1 building sets (sold separately) let kids create 3 different models inspired by some of their biggest passions, including animals, vehicles and houses
description: From the manufacturer 3 LEGO animal playsets in 1 box Kids can play out stories with this Wild Animals: Majestic Rhino with Birds set, then rebuild it into a hippo or a walrus toy. Endless play options Animal-loving boys and girls aged 8 and over enjoy a fun build before staging stories with 3 different playsets. LEGO Creator Wild Animals: Majestic Rhino with Birds Go on safari Posable rhino toy comes with 4 birds and a snail. Hippo toy Model can move its legs, tail, neck, ears and mouth. Dive into deep icy waters Posable walrus toy comes with a fish. Enjoy a fun digital experience Little builders can save their progress, zoom in and rotate models in 3D with the LEGO Builder app. Learn, build and play Kids can develop great building and storytelling skills with this fun LEGO Creator 3 in 1 building set.
